extraction_metadata.extractor: Claude Opus 4.8 (Cowork; single-pass coordinate + image-page reconstruction, human-reviewed draft)
extraction_metadata.extraction_notes: INSTRUCT-UC. Marks from PDF coordinates. ~2/3 of pages are image-based with glyph-split text: activity labels reconstructed (may retain minor artifacts). Tables 2/3 are tiled into V10-19 and V20-29 column blocks listing DIFFERENT activity subsets (e.g. Endoscopy N/A for responders at V10-19; universal rows print only in the continued tile) - merged by activity name, block B (V20-29) canonical. CCI = confidential-commercial-information redactions (black bars) in source. Comment column captured as per-row source_note annotations.

table_metadata.table_title: Schedule of Activities for the Extension Induction and Extension Maintenance Treatment Periods
table_metadata.table_purpose: Extension period (nonresponders at Week 12), Visits V10-V29.
table_metadata.notes: Document page numbers of full protocol PDF.
